title: HAB Event Catalog — Controlled Vocabularies
description: Enum values and definitions for categorical fields in the event catalog

event_category.description: Primary impact type of the HAB event

values.fish_kill: Primary impact is fish mortality (farmed or wild)
values.human_health: Primary impact is human illness/poisoning (PSP, DSP, CFP, etc.)
values.economic: Primary impact is economic (closures, tourism) without major mortality

event_status.description: Whether the event has concluded or recurs periodically

values.recurrent: Annual or periodic recurrence (e.g., Florida red tides)

environment_type.description: Type of water body where the event occurred

taxonomic_class.description: Taxonomic class of the primary causative species

values.Other: Other taxonomic classes not listed above

fish_affected_type.description: Whether farmed, wild, or both types of fish were affected

qualifier.description: Precision qualifier for numeric values (fish_killed_n_qualifier, fish_killed_tonnes_qualifier)

values.minimum: Known minimum; true value likely higher

economic_loss_type.description: What is included in the economic loss estimate

values.minimum: Known minimum; true value likely higher
values.range: Source provides a range rather than point estimate

human_syndrome.description: Type of human health syndrome caused by the HAB

values.other: Other health effects not listed above
values.cyanotoxin: Illness caused by any cyanobacterial toxin via drinking water, dialysis, or recreational exposure

ecological_impact_level.description: Breadth of ecological impact beyond target fish

values.partially_effective: Some benefit but impacts still significant

data_quality.description: Overall quality assessment of the source data

values.medium: Government report or peer-reviewed with some ambiguity
values.low: News source, personal communication, or significant uncertainty

extraction_confidence.description: Confidence in the accuracy of extracted values

values.medium: Values inferred or calculated from source
values.low: Values uncertain, conflicting sources, or extrapolated

extraction_agent.description: Who or what performed the data extraction

values.claude_verified: Extracted by Claude and verified by human

verification_status.description: Whether the entry has been verified by a human researcher

values.verified: Reviewed and confirmed by human researcher
